positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a constellation of celestial animals, featuring a fox, a bear, a soaring eagle, and a curious owl, connected by glowing, minimalist stardust lines. The style is modern whimsical line art combined with deep cosmic watercolor washes and geometric precision. The animals should have clean, recognizable silhouettes with strong contrast against a midnight blue and deep violet background. The composition should be centered and highly detailed yet flat enough for screen printing. Utilize glowing gold and soft cyan accents for the stardust and highlights. High-quality vector aesthetic, ideal for t-shirt print, volumetric lighting, high resolution, symmetrical arrangement.
